nodes.label: MATLAB Guide to Finite Elements — An Interactive Approach (Kattan 2007)
nodes.norm_label: matlab guide to finite elements — an interactive approach (kattan 2007)

nodes.label: Single Source File Constraint
nodes.rationale: All code in src/LibFEM.jl; append new functions to this single file and add export calls; do not create new source files

nodes.label: Angle Convention (Degrees Internally Converted to Radians)
nodes.rationale: All angle parameters passed in degrees; converted to radians internally to match educational FEM text conventions
nodes.norm_label: angle convention (degrees internally converted to radians)

nodes.label: Dimension Prefix Convention (d1_, d2_, d3_)
nodes.rationale: Function names use d1_ (1D), d2_ (2D), d3_ (3D) prefixes for element dimensionality

nodes.label: 3-Function Extension Pattern
nodes.rationale: Elements implement elementstiffness, assemble, and one of elementforce/stress/strain

nodes.label: MATLAB to Julia Name Mapping Convention
nodes.rationale: MATLAB {ElementType}{Operation} -> Julia d{N}_{element}_{operation} in snake_case; Spring=spring, LinearBar/PlaneTruss/SpaceTruss=truss, Beam/PlaneFrame/SpaceFrame=beam
nodes.norm_label: matlab to julia name mapping convention

nodes.label: Unused ModelingToolkit Dependency
nodes.rationale: ModelingToolkit v10.2.0 in Project.toml but never imported or used in src/LibFEM.jl; candidate for removal

nodes.label: Missing Plots.jl Dependency for Diagram Functions
nodes.rationale: d2_beam_elementaxialdiagram, elementmomentdiagram, elementsheardiagram call plot() and title() directly without importing Plots or having it in Project.toml; would error at runtime
nodes.norm_label: missing plots.jl dependency for diagram functions

nodes.label: Doc/ Directory Read-Only Constraint
nodes.rationale: Doc/ contains Kattan MATLAB reference files; do not modify them — they are verification sources

nodes.label: d2_beam 3 DOF per Node Indexing Scheme
nodes.rationale: d2_beam uses d3_ indexing (3 DOF/node) because beam elements carry both axial and bending behavior, unlike 2 DOF for spring/truss
nodes.norm_label: d2_beam 3 dof per node indexing scheme

nodes.label: Unimplemented MATLAB Element Types (SpaceFrame, Continuum, Grid, FluidFlow)
nodes.norm_label: unimplemented matlab element types (spaceframe, continuum, grid, fluidflow)

nodes.label: Known Code Quality Issues
nodes.rationale: Docstring errors (strain vs stress, extraneous export, PascalCase in docstring), double-space in export, MATLAB syntax in plotting code ('k' instead of :black), commented-out hold on

nodes.label: Missing Features (BCs, Solvers, Mesh Helpers, Test Suite)
nodes.rationale: No boundary condition functions, no solver functions, no mesh/model helpers, no Project.toml [extras] for Test
nodes.norm_label: missing features (bcs, solvers, mesh helpers, test suite)

nodes.label: MATLAB Beam vs PlaneFrame Critical Distinction
nodes.rationale: MATLAB BeamElement* is 4x4 (2 DOF/node, pure bending) with no Julia counterpart; PlaneFrameElement* is 6x6 (3 DOF/node) mapping to d2_beam_*. Critical mapping finding.
nodes.norm_label: matlab beam vs planeframe critical distinction

nodes.label: Single-Module File Architecture
nodes.rationale: All code in src/LibFEM.jl (~585 lines): module with using Plots, deg2rad and _assemble! helpers, then d1_/d2_/d3_ functions individually exported

nodes.label: d{N}_{domain}_{operation} Naming Convention
nodes.rationale: Julia snake_case translating MATLAB PascalCase: N=dimensionality (1/2/3), domain=element type (spring/truss/beam), operation=function purpose

nodes.label: Extension Points for New Element Types
nodes.rationale: 5-step process: implement stiffness matrix, assemble (1-liner via _assemble!), force/stress/strain, export, add tests. Key invariants: degrees, symmetric matrices, .+= assembly.
nodes.norm_label: extension points for new element types

nodes.label: MATLAB Guide to Finite Elements (2nd Edition, 2007)
nodes.author: Peter I. Kattan
nodes.norm_label: matlab guide to finite elements (2nd edition, 2007)

nodes.label: Diagram Functions for Beam/Frame (Shear, Moment, Axial, Torsion)
nodes.norm_label: diagram functions for beam/frame (shear, moment, axial, torsion)
